headline: Is AngloGold Ashanti Positioned for Further Adjusted EBITDA Upside?
summary: AU posts record $6.3B EBITDA in 2025, up 129% on higher output, Sukari boost and cost discipline; rising gold prices and efficiency may lift further.

headline: Hycroft Appoints Eric Colby as Executive Vice President, Corporate Development
summary: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) ("Hycroft" or "the Company") today announced the appointment of Eric Colby as Executive Vice President, Corporate Development.

headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Newmont (NEM) After Its 104% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Newmont at around US$113.04 is still offering value after a strong run, the key is to understand what the current price is actually pricing in. The stock shows mixed recent returns, with a 4.3% decline over the last 7 days, a 2.6% gain over 30 days, an 11.7% gain year to date and a 104.7% gain over the last year, alongside 152.1% over 3 years and 96.6% over 5 years. Recent headlines around Newmont have focused on its position within the broader materials sector...
